name: 霸總深情告白＋全部身家轉讓
name_en: CEO's Romantic Confession + Full Asset Transfer
description: 男主將名下所有房產、信託基金、世界第一財團股份全部轉到女主名下，用極致的物質奉獻表達愛意。這是「霸總寵妻」的終極表達，滿足觀眾對理想愛情的幻想。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: These are all the properties under my name. They've all been transferred to Gounen. / All the shares I own in the world's number one corporation, Chongqing Group, are now also in your name. / If my wife tells me to go east, I'll never go west.
